text: Beyond Neptune lies a hidden treasure—the Kuiper Belt. This icy region is home to Pluto and countless other remnants from our solar system's formation. Imagine floating in a vast expanse where icy bodies collide and create new worlds. Scientists believe the Kuiper Belt could hold clues about the early solar system. These remnants might even reveal secrets about planets yet to be discovered! Curious to learn more? Hit that follow and dive deeper into space with us!
